subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-03
subcodes.first_line: No one was a denier of His virtues. All the wise men of the East considered Him the greatest person in the world. But they said, 'Alas, that He has claimed divinity for Himself.'
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفسی منکر فضائل مبارک نبود و جمیع عقلای شرق اول شخص عالم میدانستند ولی می گفتند حیف که ادعای الوهیت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @universality of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
